hypothesis: 2-hop traversal from INDEX.md seeds covers >=65% of lesson corpus. INDEX.md direct coverage <30%. citation_retrieval.py closes gap to >=80%.
method: Parse all L-*.md Cites: headers + body L-NNN refs to build citation graph. Measure: (1) INDEX.md direct L-ref count, (2) 1-hop reachability, (3) 2-hop reachability, (4) giant component size. Compare to L-929 baseline (S417).

verdict.overall: F-BRN7 CONFIRMED: citation graph traversal provides 90.6% coverage at N=879. INDEX.md decay (29.5%->11.8%) confirms structural retrieval gap. Giant component grew 86.6%->98.6%.
